item.description: One sentence per paragraph when writing paper or thesis just so that you know what you are talking about!.

item.title: Untitled
item.description: A comparison of the effect of angels and venture capitalists on innovation and value creation Summary of the Paper: The paper titled “A comparison of the effect of angels and venture capitalists on innovation and value creation” by Supradeep Dutta and Timothy B.
